---
title: "Grant Application"
subtitle: "Curtin NBF Learning & Teaching Grant 2026"
format:
  html: default
format-links: false
---

## NBF Grant Application

| Field | Detail |
|-------|--------|
| **Amount** | AUD $20,000 |
| **Period** | Semester 1 2026 - December 2026 |
| **Reporting** | First half of 2027 |
| **Equity cohorts** | Low SES students; first-in-family students |

### Document

- [NBF Grant Application 2026](nbf-grant-application.qmd) - Full application (v6.0)
